## Summary

Describe the behavior and motivation.

## Validation

- [ ] Unity Edit Mode tests pass.
- [ ] Unsupported platforms still compile or are unaffected.
- [ ] Public behavior and changelog are updated.
- [ ] No credentials, provisioning data, generated Xcode output, or personal model data are included.

## Native testing

List tested Apple device, OS, Xcode, and Unity versions, or write “not applicable.”
